home.badge: AI Background Removal · Runs in Browser · Completely Free
home.lead:
Three AI engines to choose from, one-click cutout or manual precision.
Images never leave your browser, 100% local processing.
home.demoSub: Runs entirely in browser · No data uploaded
home.modesSub: Two modes for different scenarios, switch anytime
home.autoDesc: Upload an image, AI automatically identifies and removes the background, returns transparent PNG. Supports imgly, Transformers.js, rembg-web engines.
home.manualDesc: Color picker for background selection, Flood Fill algorithm for precise removal. Mask brush protects subject, tolerance slider controls precision, supports undo/redo.
home.stepsSub: Simple and fast, no registration required
home.stepUploadDesc: Drag & drop, click to upload, or paste (Ctrl+V). Supports JPG, PNG, WebP formats.
home.stepProcessDesc: Auto mode uses AI to detect background; manual mode picks colors precisely with mask protection.
home.stepDownloadDesc: Preview instantly, download transparent PNG with one click. No watermark, no limits.

auto.pageSub: AI one-click background removal · Three engines · Runs entirely locally

auto.tip2: Clearer images with distinct subject outlines work best
auto.tip3: For portraits, use Transformers.js or rembg-web's u2net_human_seg model
auto.tip4: For anime images, use rembg-web's isnet-anime model
auto.tip5: First engine load downloads model files, cached afterwards
auto.tip6: All processing runs locally, images are never uploaded

manual.pageSub: Color picker + Flood Fill precise removal · Mask protection · Undo/redo

manual.instruction2: Adjust tolerance slider to control removal range (15–65 recommended)

manual.instruction5: Use "Protect" brush to paint areas you don't want removed
manual.instruction6: When satisfied, click "Download PNG" to save transparent image

faq.sectionSub: Everything you need to know about BG-Zero

q1.question: Is BG-Zero completely free?
q1.answer: Yes, BG-Zero is 100% free to use. There are no watermarks, no file size limits, and no hidden fees. You can remove backgrounds from as many images as you want.

q2.question: Does BG-Zero upload my images to a server?
q2.answer: No. All AI processing runs locally in your browser using WebAssembly technology. Your images never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy and data security.

q3.question: Which AI engines does BG-Zero support?
q3.answer: BG-Zero offers three AI engines: imgly (IS-Net model, ~40MB, compatible with all browsers), Transformers.js (RMBG-1.4, ~176MB, best quality, requires WebGPU), and rembg-web (7+ models from 4.7MB, MIT licensed).

q4.question: Can I use BG-Zero offline?
q4.answer: After the first visit, AI model files are cached in your browser. Subsequent visits can process images even without an internet connection, as long as the model cache hasn't been cleared.

q5.question: What image formats are supported?
q5.answer: BG-Zero supports JPG, PNG, WebP, and BMP formats. The maximum file size is 25MB. Results are exported as transparent PNG files.

q6.question: What's the difference between Auto and Manual mode?
q6.answer: Auto mode uses AI to detect and remove backgrounds with one click — perfect for most images. Manual mode lets you pick specific colors with an eyedropper and use Flood Fill for precise removal, with a mask brush to protect areas you want to keep.
